commands.summary: RP00 control-plane contract validation passed for RP00.P00.M07.S02 in production_ready state after actual Claude C00 review, adjudication, and construction inspection.
Spec requirement ledger validation passed with 227 requirements.
Law Firm OS product contract validation passed with 9 modules, 9 principles, and 7 invariants.
Weighted implementation ledger validation passed with 3,300 source micro phases and 54,355 implementation subphases.
Full microphase plan validation passed with 3,300 micro phases, 30 release programs, 10 standard phases, and 11 micro phases per phase.
Goal closeout protocol validation passed for all goals with claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, bank, tax identifier, credential, secret, production export, or customer-support attachment data was used.
Generation commands are excluded from closeout evidence for this acceptance gate definition.
H00 command ids are machine-validated as H00 subset entries that map to executed exit_code 0 commands.
Final validation was rerun after Claude C00 review, adjudication, construction inspection, and production_ready promotion.
